queryLines: SELECT *,decimal(TotalCharges) as TotalCharges_decimal FROM patients where trim(TotalCharges)<>''

datasets.name: 57a10bdc
queryLines:
--denormalized/wide/fat fact (As a part of wrangling in the Dataengg pipeline, this table denorm_wide_fact is already enabled by Dataengineers)
--create table denorm_wide_fact as
/*
SELECT d.*,p.*,decimal(p.TotalCharges) as TotalCharges_decimal 
FROM drug_info d inner join patients p 
on d.uniqueID=p.drugid
where trim(TotalCharges)<>'';*/

--Below Query/Declarative/Imperative Pipeline will be created by our Data engineers
/*
create or replace table drug_patients_wide_fact as
--This is my Star Schema Model Query
SELECT d.*,p.*,decimal(p.TotalCharges) as TotalCharges_decimal 
FROM catalog1_we47.schema1_we4.drug_info d inner join catalog1_we47.schema1_we4.patients p 
on d.uniqueID=p.drugid
where trim(TotalCharges)<>'';

create or refresh materialized view drug_patients_wide_fact_mat_vw as 
select * from drug_patients_wide_fact;
*/

select * from drug_patients_wide_fact_mat_vw;

datasets.name: 462534ef
queryLines:
--Aggregated/summary fact
SELECT rating,Multipleillness,InPatient,count(1) as cnt,sum(double(p.TotalCharges)) sum_tot_charges
FROM drug_info d inner join patients p 
on d.uniqueID=p.drugid
where trim(TotalCharges)<>''
group by rating,Multipleillness,InPatient

datasets.name: e2e4bb59
queryLines:
SELECT distinct staff_geo.shipment_id,staff_geo.age,staff_geo.origin_hub_city,staff_geo.load_dt,staff_geo.staff_full_name,staff_geo.hub_location,
cast(staff_geo.latitude as double) as latitude ,cast(staff_geo.longitude as double) as longitude,geo.country 
FROM catalog1_we4.schema1_we4.gold_staff_geo_enriched_dlt2 staff_geo 
inner join catalog1_we4.schema1_we4.master_city_list geo
on staff_geo.hub_location = geo.city_name;
